feature_name: Web Application Firewall
notes: WAF inline Prevention mode OR firewall_policy linked (WAF v2) → PASS; Detection mode → FAIL; no WAF → FAIL

feature_name: Network Security Group Support
notes: NSG attaches to subnet not gateway resource; not ARM-checkable per-gateway → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Azure Private Link
notes: private_link_configurations non-empty → PASS (Private Link active on frontend)

feature_name: Disable Public Network Access
notes: No public_ip_address in any frontend_ip_configurations → PASS (private-only deployment)

feature_name: Monitor Anomalies and Threats Targeting Sensitive Data
notes: WAF Prevention mode → traffic inspection/anomaly detection active → PASS proxy

feature_name: Encrypt Data in Transit — Frontend SSL Policy
notes: ssl_policy.min_protocol_version in (TLSv1_2 / TLSv1_3) → PASS; None → FAIL (allows TLS 1.0/1.1)

feature_name: Encrypt Data in Transit — Backend TLS
notes: All backend_http_settings_collection[*].protocol=Https → PASS; any Http → FAIL

feature_name: Encrypt Data at Rest with Platform-Managed Keys
notes: AppGW configuration encrypted at rest with MS-managed keys by default — auto-PASS (static)

feature_name: Encrypt Data at Rest with Customer-Managed Key
notes: AppGW does not support CMK; MS-managed keys only → UNKNOWN with rationale

feature_name: Manage Cryptographic Keys using Key Management Service
notes: KV-backed certs (key_vault_secret_id) + MI assigned → PASS proxy; inline certs → FAIL

feature_name: Certificate Management using Azure Key Vault
notes: key_vault_secret_id set on any ssl_certificate → PASS; inline certs → FAIL

feature_name: Use Centralized Identity and Authentication System — Disable Local Auth
notes: AppGW has no SAS/shared-key; ARM RBAC only → UNKNOWN with rationale

feature_name: Use Centralized Identity and Authentication System — AAD Auth Required
notes: ARM RBAC (Entra) is only mgmt plane auth — inherently satisfied but not configurable property → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Use Azure AD Managed Identities for Azure Resource Authentication
notes: identity present (SystemAssigned/UserAssigned) → PASS; used for KV certificate retrieval

feature_name: Use Azure AD Service Principals for Azure Resource Authentication
notes: SP assignments via ARM RBAC; not readable per-gateway without azure-mgmt-authorization → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Restrict Resource Access Based on Conditions — Conditional Access
notes: CA policies Entra tenant-level; not ARM-readable → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Restrict the Exposure of Credential and Secrets — Use Azure Key Vault
notes: KV-backed certs + MI → PASS; inline certs → FAIL; no certs → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Enable Threat Detection Capabilities — Microsoft Defender for Application Gateway
notes: No Defender for AppGW product; WAF (NS-1) covers L7 threat detection → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Enable Logging for Azure Resources
notes: MonitorManagementClient.diagnostic_settings.list(gw.id); any enabled log → PASS; key: AccessLog + FirewallLog

feature_name: Ensure Regular Automated Backups — Azure Backup Service
notes: Azure Backup does not support AppGW config; ARM template export is manual only → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Ensure Regular Automated Backups — Native Soft-Delete and Purge Protection
notes: No soft-delete or purge-protection for AppGW config; recovery via IaC templates → UNKNOWN

feature_name: Use Only Approved Azure Services — Azure Policy Support
notes: Tags presence as proxy for policy governance; empty tags → FAIL

feature_name: Use Only Approved Applications in Virtual Machine — Defender for Cloud AAC
notes: PaaS — Adaptive Application Controls target VMs and Arc servers only

feature_name: Separate and Limit Highly Privileged/Administrative Users — Disable Local Admin
notes: AppGW has no local admin/shared-key concept; ARM RBAC only → UNKNOWN with rationale

feature_name: Follow Just Enough Administration Principle — RBAC for Data Plane
notes: AppGW has no separate data-plane RBAC; JEA enforced at ARM RBAC level → UNKNOWN with rationale

feature_name: Determine Access Process for Microsoft Support — Customer Lockbox
notes: AppGW in Lockbox supported list (GA); subscription-level only — per-gateway check not available → UNKNOWN

feature_name: EDR Solution
notes: PaaS — no customer compute; EDR not applicable

feature_name: Anti-Malware Solution
notes: PaaS — no customer OS layer

feature_name: Anti-Malware Solution Health Monitoring
notes: PaaS — ES-2 not applicable therefore ES-3 not applicable

feature_name: Azure Automation State Configuration
notes: PaaS — DSC targets VMs and Arc machines

feature_name: Azure Policy Guest Configuration Agent
notes: PaaS — Guest Config requires customer guest OS

feature_name: Custom Container Images
notes: PaaS — Microsoft manages AppGW runtime

feature_name: Custom VM Images
notes: PaaS — no customer VM images

feature_name: Vulnerability Assessment using Microsoft Defender
notes: PaaS — no stack to scan

feature_name: Azure Automation Update Management
notes: PaaS — Microsoft patches AppGW infrastructure
